ORDER ON STIPULATION TO VACATE ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND CLERK'S JUDGMENT

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT GABRIELA CARDONA'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL RESPONSES FOR INTERROGATORIES AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS FROM BANK OF AMERICA, N.A, AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. THOUGH THE PLAINTIFF INDICATES IN ITS PAPERS THAT SUBSTANTIALLY COMPLIANT RESPONSES WILL BE SERVED, THE DEFENDANT'S REPLY INDICATES THAT NO SUCH SERVICES HAS TAKEN PLACE. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,810.00, PAYABLE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: NOAH LEBOWITZ; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-21-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-12-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-10-2018 Continued To Mar-25-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion For Order To Compel Responses For Interrogatories And Production Of Documents From Bank Of America, N.A, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Nathaniel Bigger, Esq., Law Offices of Nathaniel Bigger, Telpehone (415) 295-4735, appearing for Defendant Gabriela Cardona;

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GABRIELA CARDONA'S Motion For Order To Compel Responses For Interrogatories And Production Of Documents From Bank Of America, N.A, And For Monetary Sanctions

The motion is GRANTED. Though the plaintiff indicates in its papers that substantially compliant responses will be served, the Defendant's reply indicates that no such services has taken place. The request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $1,810.00, payable within 10 days of notice of entry of order.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2018 Set For Trial On Jan-07-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
